headline: Trump 🍊💥 SLAMS 25% Tariff BOMB 💣 on Iran Simps 🇨🇳🕌
text:
Trump Daddy 🍊👑 dropping TARIFF NUKES 💣📈 on ANY COUNTRY simp-scumming 💦🐔 with IRAN 🕌😡 – 25% levy on ALL GOODS 🚫💰 EFFECTIVE IMMEDIATELY ⚡🚀 cuz Tehran protests 🔥🪧 hitting WEEK THREE 😤💥! No deets on 'doing business' 🤷‍♂️💸 but CHINA 🐉🇨🇳 #1 trading HOE 🤑, then IRAQ 🏜️, UAE 🕌💰, TURKEY 🦃🍆 & INDIA 🥜📱 all sweating 😰💦 like Khamenei’s bald dome 🌝 under riot heat 🔥! White House babe Karoline Leavitt 💅📢 spilling: MILITARY OPTIONS 🛩️💣 STILL ON TABLE including AIR STRIKES 😤🫡 – Trump threatened to BOMB 🎯 if mullahs murder more protesters!

Truth Social flex 📱🔥: 'Any simp nation bussin’ with Islamic Republic pays 25% on USA deals 💸🚫 – ORDER FINAL AF ‼️' Protests POPPED from RIAL 💸📉 tanking to toilet levels 🚽😩 – shopkeeps in Tehran RAGING 🛒🤬 over cooking oil 🛢️🍲 & meat 🥩 sky-high prices cuz 40%+ INFLATION 🤯📈 & corruption eating economy like ayatollah’s harem snacks 🍆👳‍♂️! HRANA verifies ~500 protester souls 💀🕊️ + 48 security bros, BBC whispers TOLL WAY HIGHER 😱🔒 – THOUSANDS ARRESTED 👮‍♂️⛓️ but INTERNET BLACKOUT 🌑🚫 since Thursday got journos BLINDED 🤡📰!

Trump teasing IRAN OFFICIALS 📞😏 called to NEGOTIATE 🗣️ but 'may ACT FIRST 💥 before meetup' – nukes sanctions from NUCLEAR DRAMA ☢️🕌 already CRIPPLING Tehran’s wallet 💀📉 w/ mismanagement & graft! Khamenei legitimacy CRISIS 😭👑 as rial hits RECORD LOW 🚀⬇️ – Trump channeling Art of the Deal 🧠💼 to CRUSH the mullah simps while protesters YEET regime 🔥🪨! China boutta feel that TARIFF DICK SLAP 🍆💥 on their oil deals 🛢️🇨🇳, UAE sheikhs panicking 🕌😱, Turkey Erdogan sweating 🦃🤫 – USA FIRST 🚀🇺🇸 or PAY UP 🤑‼️ Wall Street watching if this sparks TRADE WAR ORGY 💸🤼‍♂️ but Trump like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC 🍔👊' – Khamenei cucked, protests BRRRR 😩🚀!
